## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and enhance Homebase's Airtable content database, focusing on improving data organization, analysis capabilities, and workflow automation.](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel demonstrated advanced Airtable features to enhance Kerry's content database, including relational tables, rollups, and data visualization.](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [The team identified potential improvements for data import, including the need for WordPress XML export and integration with Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Future plans include automating processes once Homebase migrates to Webflow, enabling more efficient content management and analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Database Structure and Enhancements

  - [Marcel duplicated Kerry's existing database and demonstrated advanced features:](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Created relational tables for authors, categories, and other metadata](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [Implemented rollups to aggregate data (e.g., post counts by category)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [Added fields for organic traffic, keywords, and cost data](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Kerry expressed excitement about the potential for automatic gap analysis and deeper performance insights](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

### Data Import and Integration Challenges

  - [Identified need for WordPress XML export to retrieve original publication dates](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Discussed limitations with Airtable's import capabilities (5MB file size limit)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Explored possibilities for integrating Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Acknowledged manual data entry challenges for large datasets (943 URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### Future Automation and CMS Migration

  - [Plans to automate processes once Homebase migrates to Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Discussed potential for direct integration using Zapier, though noted high costs for frequent updates](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Aim to extract content body directly from CMS rather than using current scraping and LLM processing method](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Content Strategy and Analysis

  - [Kerry explained their content categorization system:](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Product funnel: Aligns content with specific product areas (e.g., payroll, scheduling)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Funnel stage: Indicates where content fits in the buyer's journey (top, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Discussed potential for analyzing content performance by various dimensions (product, funnel stage, vertical, persona)](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

### fwd.digital Business Update

  - [Marcel shared that fwd.digital now has 14 customers and is scaling rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [Considering raising capital to accelerate growth and enhance customer service](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
  - [Expanding team with graphics professionals and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

## Next Steps

  - Kerry to explore exporting WordPress XML file for historical data import
  - Marcel to transfer ownership of the enhanced Airtable base to Kerry
  - Investigate integration possibilities with Google Search Console
  - [Kerry to utilize new Airtable features for content gap analysis and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/LBmDLARpNBDPnrAdxNkTvxsw2MXup7NC?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - Schedule follow-up to discuss further enhancements and automation possibilities post-Webflow migration
